description: Vocational-rehab deposition. 8 seeded errors spanning spelling, context/homophone, legal_term, punctuation, extra_word, and one speaker [sic] error. One deliberate false-positive trap ('Did you recall whether...' is grammatical and should NOT be flagged).

seeded_errors.note: Question with no question mark: 'Could you state your full name for the record' ends with no '?'.
Homophone: 'before you waved your right' should be 'waived'.
Homophone: 'did you go their in person' should be 'there'.
U.S. legal spelling: 'summary judgement' should be 'judgment'. Prompt explicitly calls this out.
Speaker error (nonstandard word actually spoken). Should be [sic], NOT corrected to 'Regardless'.
Misspelled legal term: 'writ of habeous corpus' should be 'habeas'.

false_positive_traps.text: Did you recall whether the plaintiff was taking
false_positive_traps.note: Grammatical question. Some models hallucinate a missing 'not' here. Should NOT be flagged.
